zh.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley是Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley和Alice Pantulf的女兒，於1174年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾哈德利。她於大約1212年與Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1225年2月19日享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley是Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley和Alice Pantulf的女儿，于1174年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾哈德利。她于大约1212年与Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1225年2月19日享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hadley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from either of three places called Hadley, in Worcestershire and Shropshire, or from either of two places called Hadleigh, in Essex and Suffolk, or Monken Hadley in Middlesex. The first is named from the Old English personal name Hadda + lēah ‘wood, (woodland) clearing’; the others are from Old English hǣth ‘heathland, heather’ + lēah.
In some cases also Native American (Navajo): variant of   Hatathlie   ‘singer (i.e. medicine man)’. Compare   Singer   5.

variants.name: Hatathlie
meanings: Native American (Navajo): from an American English altered (and shortened) form of a Navajo personal name such as Hataałii Yázhí, based on the occupational name hataałii which means literally ‘singer’ and denotes a medicine man. Compare Hadley 2 and Singer 6.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley was born in 1174, in Hadley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley and Alice Pantulf. She married Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley about 1212, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 19 February 1225, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley est née en 1174, à Hadley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley et Alice Pantulf. Elle a épousé Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley environ 1212, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 février 1225, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley wurde 1174 in Hadley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley und Alice Pantulf geboren. Sie hat um 1212 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. Februar 1225 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley è nata il nel 1174 nel Hadley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley e Alice Pantulf. Lei sposato Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley circa 1212, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 19 febbraio 1225, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadleyは1174年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアハドリーでAlan Hadley ,Lord of HadleyとAlice Pantulfの娘として生まれた。約1212年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでRoger Corbet ,Lord of Tasleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1225年2月19日に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley(은)는 1174년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 하들리에서 Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley(와)과 Alice Pantulf의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1212년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 2월 19일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley nasceu em 1174, em Hadley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley e Alice Pantulf. Ela casou-se com Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley aproximadamente 1212, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1225, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecily Hadley родилась в 1174 г. в местности хадли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Alan Hadley ,Lord of Hadley и Alice Pantulf. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley около 1212 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 19 февраля 1225 г. в возрасте 51 год.
